issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
The skill contains verbose sections that could be more concise.

scenarios.name: Design a SaaS hero section that avoids common AI-generated UI tells
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented hero pattern (badge + headline + subhead + dual CTA with max-w-4xl text-center), Tailwind tinted neutrals instead of pure gray, avoids the flagged purple gradient default, and uses ease-out transitions; baseline produces a generic centered hero often with the purple gradient anti-pattern.

scenarios.name: Design a responsive dashboard stats row with metric cards and trend indicators
scenarios.rationale: Treatment matches the documented grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 layout, uses rounded-xl border bg-white p-6 cards with text-3xl semibold values and conditional text-green-600/text-red-600 trend coloring; baseline tends to ship a flat row without the documented responsive breakpoints or trend-color mapping.
